root.sql: SELECT vr_nsk_010_007005.balance_date, vr_nsk_010_007005.loan_code, vr_nsk_010_007005.loan_code_desc, vr_nsk_010_007005.member_status_code, vr_nsk_010_007005.member_status_name, vr_nsk_010_007005.member_group_no, vr_nsk_010_007005.member_group_name, vr_nsk_010_007005.membership_no, vr_nsk_010_007005.memname, vr_nsk_010_007005.emer_contract, vr_nsk_010_007005.emer_loantype, vr_nsk_010_007005.emer_paycode, vr_nsk_010_007005.emer_installment, vr_nsk_010_007005.emer_period, vr_nsk_010_007005.emer_balance, vr_nsk_010_007005.emer_intarr, vr_nsk_010_007005.emer_shot, vr_nsk_010_007005.emer_long, vr_nsk_010_007005.emer_last_date, vr_nsk_010_007005.emer_last_cal ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,(select sc_lon_m_loan_card.year_total_interest from sc_lon_m_loan_card where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = vr_nsk_010_007005.emer_contract)as year_total_interest FROM vr_nsk_010_007005 ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where vr_nsk_010_007005.balance_date = '!balance_date_1!' --where vr_nsk_010_007005.balance_date = to_date('01/12/2025','dd/mm/yyyy') and vr_nsk_010_007005.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and vr_nsk_010_007005.emer_intarr >0 /*WHERE*/
